comment: /* Posters */ grammar—the subject is "each," which is singular.

/* Sponsorships */ multiple brands for each of these sponsors, naming a single product is possibly not [[WP:NEUTRAL]]; use of a redirect is perfectly valid and there is no need to pipe the link; [[MOS:TMRULES]]
/* Venues */  changed name of the Azetca, will keep the FIFA with the parenthesis
/* Posters */ violation of [[MOS:DATECOMMA]] (someone wrongly omitted the comma after the year) and verb tense (April 17, 2025, is not in the past, so past tense is incorrect).
/* Match schedule */ Logically, one should define the regions before referencing them
/* Draw */ fixed grammar in the hidden note.

/* Venues */ There's been no indication that FIFA will use a made-up fictional name for BC Place. It seems unlikely at the present time because that stadium doesn't have a sponsored name like the others do, and the sponsored names are what FIFA objects to for some reason.
